name: Default (catch-all)
description: Generic catch-all blueprint. Extracts all visible structured information from any unknown document type. Used as fallback in mode=auto when no specific blueprint matches.
extraction_prompt: Extract ALL visible structured information from this document. Return every field, number, date, name, identifier, address, and authority you can find. Be thorough — include every piece of text that appears to be a labelled field.

document_type.instruction: Best guess at document type (e.g., PASSPORT, ID CARD, CERTIFICATE, PERMIT, CONTRACT)

document_number.instruction: Any document, reference, or serial number found on the document

issuing_country.instruction: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of issuing country if identifiable (e.g., LTU, GBR, USA)

issuing_authority.instruction: Name of the issuing authority, ministry, or organisation as printed

document_language.instruction: ISO 639-1 code of the primary language of the document (e.g., lt, en, ru)

full_name.instruction: Full name as it appears on the document

date_of_birth.instruction: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format if present

nationality.instruction: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of nationality if present (e.g., RUS, GBR)

sex.instruction: Gender as M or F if present

date_of_issue.instruction: Issue date in YYYY-MM-DD format if present

date_of_expiry.instruction: Expiry date in YYYY-MM-DD format if present

other_fields.instruction: Any other labelled fields not captured above — return as a JSON object with field names as keys and verbatim values as values
